fields.label: How did you hear about this job? (If through one of our current employees, please share their name and your relationship with them.)
Why are you interested in this role at YipitData? What about this job opportunity compels you?
fields.value:
I'm excited about the opportunity to work at YipitData because I'm drawn to organizations that operate at scale, solve complex technical challenges, and prioritize innovation and long-term impact. Throughout my experience at Microsoft and Amazon Robotics, I've enjoyed working at the intersection of technology, operations, and strategy — leading cross-functional initiatives, building scalable systems, and driving measurable business outcomes.

What particularly interests me about YipitData is the opportunity to contribute to high-impact products and programs while collaborating with talented teams across engineering, product, and business functions. I'm especially motivated by environments where I can combine technical depth with program leadership to improve reliability, automation, and operational efficiency.

In my current role, I've led large-scale resilience and automation initiatives, developed AI-driven workflow solutions, and managed complex cross-organizational programs under executive visibility. I enjoy taking ambiguous problems, creating structure, and driving execution from concept through delivery. I'd be excited to bring that same mindset to YipitData while continuing to grow in a fast-paced and innovative environment.

Beyond the technical challenges, I'm also looking for a company whose culture emphasizes ownership, collaboration, and continuous improvement. From what I've seen, YipitData aligns strongly with those values, which makes the opportunity especially compelling to me.

fields.label: Do you have experience directly building and launching AI-powered products? If so, please elaborate on your answer.
fields.value: Yes. I have hands-on experience in this area through my work at Microsoft on the Resilience Automation Platform and earlier roles in customer-facing engineering.

fields.label: Why are you looking for new opportunities right now?
fields.value:
I'm excited about the opportunity to work at YipitData because I'm drawn to organizations that operate at scale, solve complex technical challenges, and prioritize innovation and long-term impact. Throughout my experience at Microsoft and Amazon Robotics, I've enjoyed working at the intersection of technology, operations, and strategy — leading cross-functional initiatives, building scalable systems, and driving measurable business outcomes.

What particularly interests me about YipitData is the opportunity to contribute to high-impact products and programs while collaborating with talented teams across engineering, product, and business functions. I'm especially motivated by environments where I can combine technical depth with program leadership to improve reliability, automation, and operational efficiency.

In my current role, I've led large-scale resilience and automation initiatives, developed AI-driven workflow solutions, and managed complex cross-organizational programs under executive visibility. I enjoy taking ambiguous problems, creating structure, and driving execution from concept through delivery. I'd be excited to bring that same mindset to YipitData while continuing to grow in a fast-paced and innovative environment.

Beyond the technical challenges, I'm also looking for a company whose culture emphasizes ownership, collaboration, and continuous improvement. From what I've seen, YipitData aligns strongly with those values, which makes the opportunity especially compelling to me.

fields.label: Please rank the top 3 skill sets that you'd like to further develop at YipitData.
fields.value: At Microsoft I led the Resilience Automation Platform working directly with on-call engineers and partner teams as customers — gathering requirements, running customer-feedback sessions, and shipping iterations against their workflows. Earlier roles included direct customer-facing engineering across deployment, integration, and post-sales support.

fields.label: Kindly share your LinkedIn profile with us!
A final step in the hiring process is for you to arrange reference calls with former managers, direct reports (for managerial roles), and others.
Are you legally authorized to work in the United States for YipitData?

Will you *now* OR *in the future* require employer-based sponsorship for immigration-related employment benefit(s) or visa status (e.g., H-1B, TN, I-140, etc.) to work for YipitData? 

(Immigration-related employment benefits include, for instance, H-1B, TN, O, E, and other nonimmigrant work visa/status; employment based “green card”/immigrant sponsorship, such as a labor certification, I-140 immigrant petition for alien worker, adjustment of status, consular processing, etc.)
I acknowledge that for remote-based US roles, depending upon where the remote work is performed, INCOME COULD BE SUBJECT TO NYS TAX WITHHOLDINGS.

fields.label: YipitData is an equal-opportunity employer and seeks collaboration, innovation, and excellence through diversity and inclusion. Here is a set of voluntary demographic questions that are part of our Diversity and Inclusion initiatives. You may choose not to answer the questions below. If you do choose to answer, your responses will be used (in aggregate form only) to help us identify areas for improvement in our process. Your responses, or your choice to not respond, will not be associated with your specific application and will not in any way be used in the hiring decision.
